feat.name: Underworld Investigator
feat.text: Your work as an investigator makes you familiar with the criminal element. You might be a criminal yourself, or you might have gained an understanding of how they operate from the outside. You become trained in Underworld Lore, and you gain your Pursue a Lead investigation bonus to Thievery checks to investigate a case (such as checks to Steal a clue from a suspect or Pick a Lock to open a safe with damning documents).

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.
